one_time_description: Advances to Band members - 1919 land claim (Note 20)
economic_notes: Operates gaming, tobacco store, gas bar, fisheries, and housing projects. Wallace Hill Development Inc. accounted for under modified equity method. Investments in Beaubassin Mi'kmaq Wind Mgmt Ltd. and 3270886 Nova Scotia Limited.
notes: Cost of goods sold of $9,408,941 deducted before gross profit line. Revenue shown is gross revenue $42,220,127. Total government transfers estimated from ISC $9,531,811 + Health Canada $2,463,995 + METS $889,755 + Mi'kmaw Kina'matneway $8,139,627 + other government $318,311 + DFO $241,373 + CMHC $42,978 + Covid-19 funding $350,144 + METS/other = approximately $22,045,641. OSR includes fisheries commercial revenue, tobacco store, gas bar, gaming, and other own-source. Large 1919 land claim advance of $5,583,000 to band members is unusual non-recurring item. Expenses_housing combines Capital and Housing ($1,763,366) and Housing Projects ($647,291). Covid-19 Emergency Funding schedule #14 with expenditure of $350,144 appears for first time. Debt reserve fund of $525,985 included in financial assets.
